critical_blockers.check: The Java runtime and Spring Boot line are vendor-supported
critical_blockers.action: Choose a supported target and document the upgrade sequence

critical_blockers.check: Retries are bounded, classified, and safe for the operation
critical_blockers.action: Retry only transient failures with backoff and jitter

priority_actions.check: Retries are bounded, classified, and safe for the operation
priority_actions.action: Retry only transient failures with backoff and jitter

priority_actions.check: The Java runtime and Spring Boot line are vendor-supported
priority_actions.action: Choose a supported target and document the upgrade sequence

priority_actions.check: Database changes are backward-compatible across the rollout window
priority_actions.action: Separate additive and destructive schema changes

priority_actions.check: Service-level indicators and objectives exist for critical journeys
priority_actions.action: Measure user-visible success, latency, and availability

priority_actions.check: Authentication and authorization are enforced at every exposed boundary
priority_actions.action: Centralize policy while retaining endpoint-level enforcement

priority_actions.check: Critical business behavior has automated regression coverage
priority_actions.action: Protect behavior before refactoring implementation

priority_actions.check: Slow and high-volume queries have measured plans and ownership
priority_actions.action: Optimize using representative parameters and validate result equality

priority_actions.check: Metrics expose traffic, errors, latency, saturation, and dependency health
priority_actions.action: Alert on symptoms and capacity risk, not raw log volume

priority_actions.check: Software artifacts have provenance and automated vulnerability checks
priority_actions.action: Gate releases on actionable severity thresholds

priority_actions.check: Consumer and provider contracts are versioned and verified
priority_actions.action: Validate compatibility before independent deployment

priority_actions.check: Module boundaries prevent business logic from depending directly on delivery frameworks
priority_actions.action: Introduce enforceable package or module boundaries

priority_actions.check: External integrations are isolated behind stable interfaces
priority_actions.action: Wrap remote clients, messaging, filesystem, and vendor SDKs

priority_actions.check: Connection pools, transaction timeouts, and retry behavior are bounded
priority_actions.action: Set limits from measured concurrency and database capacity

priority_actions.check: Rollout and rollback procedures are tested
priority_actions.action: Use incremental rollout with explicit abort thresholds

priority_actions.check: Logs are structured, correlated, and exclude sensitive data
priority_actions.action: Propagate correlation context across HTTP, messaging, and jobs

priority_actions.check: Backup restoration and disaster recovery are tested
priority_actions.action: Measure actual RPO and RTO instead of relying on configuration

priority_actions.check: Consumers, traffic patterns, and critical journeys are inventoried
priority_actions.action: Capture synchronous, asynchronous, batch, and manual consumers

priority_actions.check: Remote calls have timeouts and failure isolation
priority_actions.action: Define connect, read, and total deadlines plus circuit or bulkhead policy

priority_actions.check: Asynchronous consumers handle duplicates, poison messages, and replay
priority_actions.action: Make handlers idempotent and define replay ownership

priority_actions.check: Dependencies are inventoried with known vulnerabilities and end-of-life status
priority_actions.action: Remove unused libraries and plan high-risk upgrades separately

priority_actions.check: Shared libraries have a clear owner, compatibility policy, and removal path
priority_actions.action: Prefer small stable contracts over shared business logic

priority_actions.check: Traces connect expensive or failure-prone distributed paths
priority_actions.action: Instrument boundaries and retain enough context for diagnosis

priority_actions.check: Operational cost and capacity trends are reviewed
priority_actions.action: Track unit cost and define scaling or optimization triggers

priority_actions.check: Capacity limits and degradation behavior are known
priority_actions.action: Test saturation and preserve critical journeys first

priority_actions.check: Performance tests have representative data and pass/fail thresholds
priority_actions.action: Track latency, throughput, saturation, and error rate

priority_actions.check: Retention, archival, and cleanup jobs are documented and monitored
priority_actions.action: Bound table growth and rehearse cleanup failure recovery

priority_actions.check: Database, application, and message changes have an ordered release plan
priority_actions.action: Keep old and new versions interoperable during rollout

priority_actions.check: Modernization goals have measurable success criteria
priority_actions.action: Define targets for reliability, delivery speed, cost, and maintainability

priority_actions.check: JVM and container resource settings are explicit and reproducible
priority_actions.action: Version configuration and test it under representative load
